# Story Template

Use this as the starting point when creating new story files. Agents will validate that required sections exist and appear in the canonical order, but users may customize content inside each section.

---

# Story [Sprint.Number]: [Title]

**Status**: [Story_Status]
**Task Type**: [Standard_Task_Type]
**Module**: [Frontend/Backend/Full-Stack]
**Dependencies**: [None / story-XXX, story-YYY]
**Scheduling**: [Sequential / Parallel]

---

## Story

[String: User story description]

---

## Acceptance Criteria

[Markdown list of criteria]

---

## Dependencies

**Blocks**: [List of story IDs this story blocks]
**Blocked by**: [List of story IDs blocking this story]
**Reasoning**: [Why these dependencies exist]

---

## Tasks / Subtasks

[Markdown list of tasks with status checkboxes]

---

## Dev Notes

**Task Type Context**: [Task_Type]

**Additional Context** (optional):
- [List any documents beyond the default context for this task type]
- docs/coding-standards.md (automatically loaded by implementation agents)

**Technical Notes**:
[String: Implementation-specific technical notes]

---

## Context Validation

[Auto-generated by Hub Agent before story enters [I]]

- Task Type: {task_type} ✓
- Index: docs/{module}/index.md ({version}) ✓
- Task Type defined: ✓
- Required docs: {count} ✓
- Version check: [PASSED/WARNING/FAILED]
- Ready: [Yes/No]

[If FAILED, includes specific error and fix instructions]

---

## Context Loaded

[Auto-populated by implementation agents during Step 6.5]

[Logs which documents were loaded, which patterns were applied, and any context gaps]

---

## Context Checkpoint

[Auto-populated when story moves from [I] to [CR] or [Paused]]
[Used for context restoration during remediation or resume]

**ID**: {agent}-{story_number}-{timestamp}
**Docs**: {comma-separated doc names with versions}
**Implementation Approach**:
- [Key architectural decision 1]
- [Key architectural decision 2]
- [Key pattern being used]

[If restored]:
**Restored**: {timestamp}
**Mode**: [Remediation/Resume]
**From**: Checkpoint ID {previous-checkpoint-id}

---

## Implementation Progress Log

[Auto-populated as tasks are completed]

**Task Completion Timeline**:
- [Timestamp] - [Task description] (status/notes)
- Example: 10:45 - Implemented user model (schema complete)
- Example: 11:15 - [PAUSED] Validation middleware (50% complete)

---

## Pause Checkpoint

[Only created when story is paused]

**Paused At**: [Timestamp]
**Reason**: [Why paused - e.g., "story-042 remediation priority"]
**Current Task**: [Task being worked on]
**Task Progress**: [Percentage or description]
**Files Modified So Far**:
- [List of files already changed]
**Next Steps When Resume**:
- [Specific next actions]

---

## Context Restoration Log

[Created when resuming from pause or remediation]

**Restored At**: [Timestamp]
**Restore Type**: [Remediation/Resume from Pause]
**Previous Context From**: [Checkpoint timestamp]
**Documents Re-loaded**: [Count] files
**Resume Point**: [Where work continues from]

---

## Review & Testing Notes

[Log of all handoffs and feedback]
